title: Modern Decorations Mod
description: A mod that adds decorative furniture such as kitchen sets, bathroom accessories, office, etc.
body:
### MDM is a mod focused on bringing clean, modern-style interiors into Minecraft. It adds a wide range of furniture and decorative elements that let you design detailed, realistic spaces from cozy rooms to fully styled modern houses.

---

### Features
- Modern furniture for multiple room types
- Detailed interior accessories
- Stylish lighting elements
- Blocks designed for realistic interior design

---

### Perfect for
- Modern house builds
- Apartments and office interiors
- Aesthetic screenshots and showcases

---

### Why use this mod?
Vanilla Minecraft has very limited interior options so we filled that gap. This mod gives you much more freedom when it comes to decorating and detailing your builds.

---

**Is there anything you would like to see added to this mod? Or maybe you have found a bug? Join our discord and get into our community!**
[discord](https://discord.gg/YqFxSDJkPJ)

**For more specific info or to check on upcoming updates check out our website at:**
[https://cookiecraftmods.com](https://cookiecraftmods.com/)
